key_excerpts.text: Enterprise AI procurement is not a software category. It is five different categories rolled into one budget line. Hyperscaler model platforms, SaaS embeds, dedicated agent platforms, fine tuning programs, and internal model hosting each carry distinct commercial mechanics, data terms, and exit paths. This framework imposes one discipline across all five. Define the use case before the vendor. Lock the data terms before the price. Trade commitment for unit price, not volume. Hold an exit lever at every renewal poin
